data.title: Wall Street speculating on Trump tariff refunds, with investors buying importers' rights in hopes of court reversal.
data.description: Investors are interested in purchasing importers’ claims to any refunds of the administration’s tariffs, hoping for a reversal of the tariffs by the courts. It is a risky bet with no guarantee of success.

data.title: Spinwheel receives strategic investment from Citi Ventures for growth and product expansion, targeting consumer credit ecosystem.
data.description: In Oakland, California, Spinwheel, an AI-powered credit data and payments platform, has received a strategic investment from Citi Ventures. The funding infusion will aid Spinwheel in expanding its agentic AI platform, building its data sets and product offerings, and supporting its ongoing market growth efforts. Furthermore, Citi Ventures will provide guidance to Spinwheel on prioritizing product use cases crucial for major financial institutions. This financial backing is a notable achievement for Spinwheel, signaling a new phase in its development.

data.title: Stephen Miran set to face Senate during confirmation hearing amid clash over Trump firing Fed Gov. Lisa Cook.
data.description: During an upcoming confirmation hearing, Stephen Miran will appear before senators for the first high-profile Congressional showdown since President Trump's dismissal of Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook.

$AMD: SEAPORT DOWNGRADES TO NEUTRAL FROM BUY - NO PT Seaport Research cut AMD to Neutral from Buy, citing supply chain checks showing slower AI accelerator growth. The firm lowered estimates and warned the slowdown could make meeting high expectations difficult this year.

data.title: CEO Jonathan Webb of The Nuclear Company to keynote at Palantir AIPCon, demonstrating AI-driven software NOS.
data.description: The Nuclear Company, based in Columbia, South Carolina, is at the forefront of gigawatt-scale nuclear power deployment in the United States. Co-founder & CEO Jonathan Webb is set to deliver the keynote address at Palantir AIPCon 8, showcasing NOS, the inaugural AI-powered software tailored for nuclear construction. This development follows the joint announcement made in June by The Nuclear Company and Palantir to collaborate on the creation and implementation of NOS, a groundbreaking advancement in nuclear construction technology.

$AAPL - APPLE TO RAISE IPHONE PRICES FOR FIRST TIME IN 7 YEARS: MS Morgan Stanley expects Apple to modestly increase iPhone 17 prices at its Sept. 9 event, the first hike since 2017. The iPhone 17 Air will debut with a thinner design, C1 modem, and $100 premium over the iPhone

data.title: Red Pine Exploration finds 9.03 g/t of gold over 14.00 m core length, supports Open Pit Potential.
data.description: In Toronto, Red Pine Exploration Inc. (TSXV: RPX, OTCQB: RDEXF) has released new findings from a recent drilling program aimed at delineating gold mineralization near the surface at the Wawa Gold Project. The results include impressive numbers such as 9.03 grams per tonne (“g/t”) gold (“Au”) over a core length of 14.00 metres (“m”), with a standout section showing 54.40 g/t Au over 2.00 m. This data contributes to a potential open-pit scenario at the project. For more detailed information, refer to the Press Release issued on May 8, 2025.
